pet_notes: Nina, a compact full-body doll-faced Persian cat with plush grey fur, round open sweet face, small rounded ears, bushy tail, and large bright yellow eyes; soft sticker mascot style, no props.
style_notes: clean soft sticker mascot, thick readable silhouette, grey plush fur, doll-faced Persian expression, pet-size details
style_contract: Pet-safe sprite: compact full-body mascot, readable in a 192x208 cell, clear silhouette, simple face, stable palette/materials, and crisp edges for chroma-key extraction. Style `sticker`: Polished sticker mascot with bold clean shapes, crisp outline, flat colors, and minimal highlight detail. User style notes: clean soft sticker mascot, thick readable silhouette, grey plush fur, doll-faced Persian expression, pet-size details.
